notes: Initial pins seeded from the HY-IG v2 reference pair (per META-RPD) after Wave-5 reproducibility-audit flagged the URL-slug rule as implicit. Observed Streamlit 1.39.x slugification: strip leading `N_` numeric-and-underscore prefix, keep remaining underscores as underscores, do not modify case. Consumer smoke test at acceptance time asserts `streamlit.runtime.pages_manager` derives each file's slug to match `expected_slug`; mismatch blocks acceptance per GATE-29. Breadcrumb component reads `canonical_breadcrumb` instead of inferring. All 4 HY-IG v2 pages pinned; remaining pairs pinned as they reach reference-candidate status.
